mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_user_memory (userId, category, content) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.category}, #{item.content})
mapper.select: SELECT memoryId, userId, category, content, state, createTime, updateTime FROM sys_user_memory WHERE userId = #{userId} AND state = '1' ORDER BY updateTime DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT memoryId, userId, category, content, state, createTime, updateTime FROM sys_user_memory WHERE userId = #{userId} AND category = #{category} AND state = '1' ORDER BY updateTime DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user_memory SET state = '0' WHERE memoryId = #{memoryId} AND userId = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT content FROM sys_user_memory WHERE userId = #{userId} AND state = '1'
